Package View.Client.Actions

package View.Client.Actions
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    View.Client
     
    View.Client.States
     
    View.Client.Visualizes
     
  • Class
    Description
    Action
    Represents an action that can be executed by the client.
    ActionConstructor
    Interface for creating actions in the client.
    ConnectAction
    Represents an action to connect to a server with a specified hostname(IP address) and port.
    CreateGameAction
    Represents an action to create a new game with a specified match level.
    ExceptionAction
    Represents an action that handles exceptions by logging the error message.
    JoinAction
    Represents an action to join an existing game identified by its game ID.
    JoinSuccessAction
    Represents an action to be executed when a player successfully joins a game.
    LoginAction
    Represents an action to log in a user with a specified username.
    LoginFailedAction
    Represents an action that is executed when a login attempt fails.
    LoginSuccessAction
    Represents an action to be executed when a user successfully logs in.
    UpdateGameAction
    Represents an action to update the game state in the client.
    UpdateListAction
    Represents an action to update the list of game IDs in the client state.
